section_miscategorizations.reason: This is explicitly a patient-reported symptom rather than an observed exam finding; placing it under Findings could mislead a reader into thinking stridor was objectively observed on exam.

section_miscategorizations.text: There are risks associated with surgical procedures.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is more consistent with counseling/management discussion (plan for or consideration of surgery and its risks) than with diagnostic impression or problem list; however, it does not substantially distort the clinical meaning.
